bio: I am an RPA Software Developer with experience in process automation, covering everything from requirements gathering and AS-IS process mapping to solution implementation and production deployment support.
I have been working in the technology field since 2018, with previous experience as a Metrics and Requirements Analyst and as a Data & Analytics Solutions Architect.

I work with platforms such as UiPath and Power Automate, and use languages like Python, C#, and VB.NET for integrations and customizations when needed. I focus on transforming repetitive and inefficient processes into structured and reliable digital solutions.
Throughout my experience, I have contributed to the automation of processes across finance, logistics, HR, and back-office areas, driving productivity gains and reducing operational errors.

stats.label: Years of Experience in RPA Solutions

certifications.name: UiPath Certified Professional Automation Developer Professional Certification
